title: Applications open for DG Translation traineeships
content: DG Translation is opening registration for its paid, 5-month Blue Book traineeship. Discover the eligible profiles, key dates, and what trainees say about the experience.
snippet: DG Translation is opening registration for its paid, 5-month Blue Book traineeship. Discover the eligible profiles, key dates, and what trainees say about the experience.

title: New in EPREL: a comparison tool to support sustainable purchasing
content: The European Product Registry for Energy Labelling (EPREL) is the public database where anyone can freely search, filter, and sort over 2 million registered products: all those required to display the well-known A-to-G energy label.
snippet: The European Product Registry for Energy Labelling (EPREL) is the public database where anyone can freely search, filter, and sort over 2 million registered products: all those required to display the

title: Commission provides clarity on how to effectively implement EU rules to reduce methane emissions
content: These recommendations will help establish a clear, predictable and reliable framework for the effective implementation of the EU Methane Regulation, which is a key tool to reduce harmful emissions contributing to global warming as well as reinforcing security of supply by addressing methane leaks.
snippet: These recommendations will help establish a clear, predictable and reliable framework for the effective implementation of the EU Methane Regulation, which is a key tool to reduce harmful emissions

title: The Digital Product Passport Registry is now live
content: The European Commission launches the Digital Product Passport Registry together with a testing environment, marking an important milestone in making the Digital Product Passport (DPP) a practical reality for businesses placing products on the EU market.
snippet: The European Commission launches the Digital Product Passport Registry together with a testing environment, marking an important milestone in making the Digital Product Passport (DPP) a practical

title: New Twinning Learning Programme cohort brings together sixteen Mission cities and their twin partners
content: The Twinning Learning Programme, part of the EU Climate-Neutral and Smart Cities Mission, pairs cities to learn from each other and accelerate climate action. Its fifth cohort runs from September 2026 to September 2027.
snippet: The Twinning Learning Programme, part of the EU Climate-Neutral and Smart Cities Mission, pairs cities to learn from each other and accelerate climate action. Its fifth cohort runs from September 2026

title: Commission opens second-phase consultation on Quality Jobs Act
content: The European Commission has launched the second-phase consultation with European social partners on the upcoming Quality Jobs Act. This new law aims to improve working conditions, health and safety and workers’ rights across the EU, while supporting innovation and competitiveness.
snippet: The European Commission has launched the second-phase consultation with European social partners on the upcoming Quality Jobs Act. This new law aims to improve working conditions, health and safety

title: Commissioner Brunner co-hosted the third Ministerial meeting of the European Ports Alliance in Dublin
content: On 16 July, Commissioner for Internal Affairs and Migration, Magnus Brunner, co-hosted the 3rd Ministerial Meeting of the European Ports Alliance Public-Private Partnership together with the Irish Presidency, as part of the Justice and Home Affairs Council.
snippet: On 16 July, Commissioner for Internal Affairs and Migration, Magnus Brunner, co-hosted the 3rd Ministerial Meeting of the European Ports Alliance Public-Private Partnership together with the Irish

title: Commission allocates €540 million in support to farmers facing the fertiliser and energy crisis arising from the Middle East crisis
content: Member States approved the Commission's plan to allocate €540 million in financial relief to farmers impacted by the Middle East crisis due to increased fertiliser and energy costs.
snippet: Member States approved the Commission's plan to allocate €540 million in financial relief to farmers impacted by the Middle East crisis due to increased fertiliser and energy costs.

title: A plan to make Europe the first electro-continent
content: The electrification action plan will speed up the shift from fossil fuels to electricity in Europe by making electricity and electricity-based technologies more competitive
snippet: The electrification action plan will speed up the shift from fossil fuels to electricity in Europe by making electricity and electricity-based technologies more competitive

title: Questions and Answers on the 2026 Rule of Law Report
content: The Rule of Law Report is the Commission's annual preventive and monitoring tool for taking stock of rule of law developments across all EU Member States, as well as four enlargement countries.
snippet: The Rule of Law Report is the Commission's annual preventive and monitoring tool for taking stock of rule of law developments across all EU Member States, as well as four enlargement countries.

title: 2026 Rule of Law Report strengthens Europe's prosperity, security and democratic resilience
content: Today, the European Commission published its seventh annual Rule of Law Report, assessing the state of the rule of law across all EU Member States, as well as four candidate countries: Albania, Montenegro, North Macedonia and Serbia.
snippet: Today, the European Commission published its seventh annual Rule of Law Report, assessing the state of the rule of law across all EU Member States, as well as four candidate countries: Albania,

title: How to thrive in the modern workplace using the new EU guidelines
content: From empowering jobseekers with new skills to helping employers find the right talent, discover how the EU’s new guidelines transform career support across Europe.
snippet: From empowering jobseekers with new skills to helping employers find the right talent, discover how the EU’s new guidelines transform career support across Europe.

title: Portugal sees developments in migrant integration initiatives, policies and research
content: Portugal’s Council of Ministers published Resolution No. 53-A/2026 in the Diário da República, extending the validity of Temporary Protection Titles for displaced persons from Ukraine until 4 March 2027.
snippet: Portugal’s Council of Ministers published Resolution No. 53-A/2026 in the Diário da República, extending the validity of Temporary Protection Titles for displaced persons from Ukraine until 4 March

title: Commission approves €300 million Irish State aid scheme for temporary electricity price relief for energy-intensive companies
content: The European Commission has approved a €300 million Irish scheme to provide temporary electricity price relief for energy-intensive companies in line with the objectives of the Clean Industrial Deal.
snippet: The European Commission has approved a €300 million Irish scheme to provide temporary electricity price relief for energy-intensive companies in line with the objectives of the Clean Industrial Deal.

title: Commission approves Czech capacity mechanism under Clean Industrial Deal State Aid Framework
content: The European Commission has approved, under EU State aid rules, Czechia's market-wide capacity mechanism. The measure aims to ensure there is sufficient capacity to produce or store electricity, or to reduce electricity consumption so that production meets demand in the long term.
snippet: The European Commission has approved, under EU State aid rules, Czechia's market-wide capacity mechanism. The measure aims to ensure there is sufficient capacity to produce or store electricity, or to

title: Government publishes research on integration issues and migrant housing statistics in France
content: According to statistics published by the Ministry of the Interior’s Statistical Studies and Documentation Department (DSED), in France overcrowded housing affects about 7% of households overall and disproportionately impacts migrants, many of whom are non-EU nationals.
snippet: According to statistics published by the Ministry of the Interior’s Statistical Studies and Documentation Department (DSED), in France overcrowded housing affects about 7% of households overall and

title: Towards fair multilingual AI: EU MMLU, a new EU benchmark for LLMs
content: How does AI perform in different EU official languages? To find out, DG Translation has released the EU MMLU, a new EU benchmarking dataset for large language models.
snippet: How does AI perform in different EU official languages? To find out, DG Translation has released the EU MMLU, a new EU benchmarking dataset for large language models.

title: Become a European Commission trainee – applications are now open
content: The European Commission’s Blue Book Traineeship Programme, established in 1960, allows around 1,000 people from all over the EU and beyond to gain 5 months of hands-on experience in EU policymaking and administration twice a year.
snippet: The European Commission’s Blue Book Traineeship Programme, established in 1960, allows around 1,000 people from all over the EU and beyond to gain 5 months of hands-on experience in EU policymaking

title: Commission publishes guidance on the application of non-price criteria under the Net-Zero Industry Act
content: The Commission has published 2 guidance documents on the application of Articles 25 and 26 of the Net-Zero Industry Act.
snippet: The Commission has published 2 guidance documents on the application of Articles 25 and 26 of the Net-Zero Industry Act.

title: EU Hydrogen Mechanism: Call for interest to test hydrogen infrastructure
content: Building on the encouraging results from the first round of the Hydrogen Mechanism in April, the Commission plans to organise the next round later this year focusing on the development of energy infrastructure.
snippet: Building on the encouraging results from the first round of the Hydrogen Mechanism in April, the Commission plans to organise the next round later this year focusing on the development of energy

title: Six factors guiding the regenerative transition of the blue economy
content: A report by the World Economic Forum has revealed six factors guiding the regenerative transition of the blue economy.
snippet: A report by the World Economic Forum has revealed six factors guiding the regenerative transition of the blue economy.

title: Announcement – New Issue of the EU Blue Economy Observatory Newsletter
content: Discover the future of Europe’s seas in the newest EU Blue Economy Observatory Newsletter.
snippet: Discover the future of Europe’s seas in the newest EU Blue Economy Observatory Newsletter.

title: EU food and drinks enjoy strong, growing reputation internationally, new flash Eurobarometer reveals
content: New Eurobarometer findings demonstrate that EU food and drink enjoy a strong and growing international reputation, driven by quality, supported by rising interest, and Commission business missions.
snippet: New Eurobarometer findings demonstrate that EU food and drink enjoy a strong and growing international reputation, driven by quality, supported by rising interest, and Commission business missions.

title: New EU Transport and Tourism report highlights key trends and developments
content: The European Commission has published an overview of recent developments in the EU transport and tourism sectors, presenting key trends and indicators at EU level and across individual Member States.
snippet: The European Commission has published an overview of recent developments in the EU transport and tourism sectors, presenting key trends and indicators at EU level and across individual Member States.

title: Report highlights need for stronger customs controls and cooperation to protect EU citizens and businesses
content: A European Commission report published today on customs controls at the EU’s external borders highlights the need for stronger controls and enhanced cooperation to help protect consumers and businesses in the EU internal market.

title: Main asylum and migration developments of 2025 explored in new EMN Asylum and Migration Overview
content: The European Migration Network has published the Asylum and Migration Overview (AMO) 2025, outlining the legal, policy and operational developments in asylum and migration across EMN Member and Observer Countries. Dive into the full overview and relevant statistics.
snippet: The European Migration Network has published the Asylum and Migration Overview (AMO) 2025, outlining the legal, policy and operational developments in asylum and migration across EMN Member and

title: Commission endorses Latvia’s €617 million Social Climate Plan to support vulnerable households and transport users in the clean transition
content: Latvia's Social Climate Plan is the third plan under the new Social Climate Fund. It helps make the clean transition fair. It will support low and lower middle income households that are most affected by rising energy and transport costs.
snippet: Latvia's Social Climate Plan is the third plan under the new Social Climate Fund. It helps make the clean transition fair. It will support low and lower middle income households that are most affected

title: Commission sends Statements of Objections to several companies and trade associations in suspected construction chemicals cartel
content: The European Commission has informed several manufacturers of construction chemicals active in France, Germany and Spain as well as three national trade associations, of its preliminary view that they have breached EU antitrust rules by colluding to increase prices in the supply of chemicals for...

title: Commission publishes toolbox to increase public participation in renewable energy projects
content: The Commission today published a ‘toolbox’ to support Member States in promoting public inclusion in renewable energy projects. The toolbox aims to guide Member States’ authorities in involving local communities and administrations more in the development of renewable energy projects.
snippet: The Commission today published a ‘toolbox’ to support Member States in promoting public inclusion in renewable energy projects. The toolbox aims to guide Member States’ authorities in involving local

title: Commission boosts Europe's competitiveness, decarbonisation and independence with Electrification Action Plan and ETS review
content: The Commission today presents an Electrification Action Plan to make Europe the first electro-powered continent, and a stronger carbon market to support EU's industry in the clean transition and electrification.

title: New Digital Product Passport (DPP) web page launched
content: The European Commission has launched the new Digital Product Passport (DPP) web page, providing businesses, public authorities, consumers and other stakeholders with a central source of information on one of the key initiatives supporting Europe's transition to a circular economy.

title: Commission outlines measures to strengthen Europe's banking sector and support growth
content: The European Commission today adopted a Communication on the competitiveness of the EU banking sector, setting out measures to strengthen the single market for banking.
snippet: The European Commission today adopted a Communication on the competitiveness of the EU banking sector, setting out measures to strengthen the single market for banking.

title: EU and Portugal team up to keep brightest tech talents at home
content: Research and innovation news alert: Commissioner for Startups, Research, and Innovation, Ekaterina Zaharieva, concluded a high-level country visit to Portugal, reinforcing the joint commitment to accelerate competitiveness, close the innovation gap, and establish Europe as a global tech powerhouse.

title: Commission launches EU-Ukraine Drone Alliance to boost drone and counter-drone technology
content: The European Commission officially launched the EU-Ukraine Drone Alliance during the third EU-Ukraine Defence Industry Forum in Kyiv.
snippet: The European Commission officially launched the EU-Ukraine Drone Alliance during the third EU-Ukraine Defence Industry Forum in Kyiv.

title: Ban on destruction of unsold clothes and shoes enters into application
content: Under the new rules, businesses must prioritise keeping products in use by selling them or preparing them for reuse.
snippet: Under the new rules, businesses must prioritise keeping products in use by selling them or preparing them for reuse.

title: Survey on an EU Blueprint for intellectual property licensing and spinoff creation
content: The European Commission invites stakeholders to participate in a survey until 16 August 2026 on the upcoming EU Blueprint for IP licensing and spinoff creation.
snippet: The European Commission invites stakeholders to participate in a survey until 16 August 2026 on the upcoming EU Blueprint for IP licensing and spinoff creation.
